prompt: Isolated full-body side-profile character source for a mature cyberpunk horror point-and-click adventure. An adult investigator in their late thirties with realistic mature proportions, angular face, tired eyes, short practical black hair, dark graphite field jacket with a restrained oxblood-red inner collar, narrow black utility trousers, flat worn boots, fingerless clinical gloves, and a small neural-interface jack behind one ear. Human and visibly distinct from any android or thug; no armour, no weapon, no trench-coat tails, no oversized accessories. Neutral standing rest pose facing screen-right, arms relaxed, feet planted on one exact horizontal baseline. Entire figure visible and uncropped with generous transparent-looking margin on the top and both sides, but the boot soles touch the bottom baseline. Consistent readable silhouette for a small gameplay sprite. Detailed smooth cel-painted source illustration inspired by serious late-1980s and early-1990s Japanese computer adventure character art, intended for later palette quantization and Bayer dithering; do not render chunky pixel art. Place the figure against one perfectly flat saturated chroma-magenta background, RGB 255 0 255, with no gradient, no texture, no cast shadow and no floor. One character only, one pose only, no sprite sheet, no duplicate limbs, no front view, no three-quarter camera, no text, no border, no UI, no big anime eyes, no oversized head, no moe, no kawaii expression, no bright cheerful palette.
notes: Use as visual identity and image-to-image reference for a dedicated walk strip. Verify full-body crop and baseline before deriving animation.
